name: High Contrast
description: Maximum readability with strong contrast ratios and clear hierarchy.

preview.sampleText: Maximum readability with strong contrast ratios and large text.

classes.th: border-2 border-black p-3 bg-black text-white font-bold text-lg
classes.blockquote: border-l-8 border-black pl-6 italic my-6 text-black bg-gray-100 py-4
classes.code: bg-gray-200 px-2 py-1 rounded font-mono text-base text-black border border-gray-400
classes.pre: bg-gray-100 p-6 rounded overflow-x-auto border-2 border-black
